items.html: Indeed, this Nefesh is the discernment of the Gevurot: for in the Daat of the male there are Hassadim and Gevurot, since the firstborn takes a double portion, and afterwards he gives the Nukva [female] her portions, which are the Itra de Gevurot [crown of Gevurot], as mentioned. For although, while she is still Achor be Achor [back to back] with ZA [Zeir Anpin], her body is completed only through the Gevurot given to her from his posterior, as said above — even so she does not take the Gevurot themselves, only their illumination, which passes through the Masach [screen] of the posterior of ZA. The Gevurot themselves she takes only through a Zivug [coupling]: for the five Hassadim spread in his body, and the five Gevurot descend into his Yesod, and he gives it in the secret of a Zivug to the Nukva.
